    [Documentation](https://lawve.ai/en/learn/mcp-setup)[Privacy Policy](https://lawve.ai/en/privacy)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#3655595842575542765a57414057545a531855595b)
    

Browse a curated library of legal AI skills written by practicing lawyers, in-house counsel, and legal technologists. Every skill covers a specific workflow — contract review, NDA analysis, GDPR compliance, legal drafting, jurisdiction-specific research. Search the catalog from inside Claude to find the skill that fits your task and preview its practitioner-authored instructions. Bring expert guidance into your workflow — whether you're at a law firm, in-house, or building legal tech.

You can use Lawve AI to:

**Explore by topic:**  
"What skills does Lawve AI have for French employment law?"

**Find the right skill:**  
"I'm the receiving party on an NDA from a potential acquirer, which Lawve AI skill should I use?"

**Locate a specific skill:**  
"Find me a Lawve AI skill to classify a medical imaging product under the EU AI Act."

**Surface guidance:**  
"What Lawve AI skills help with GDPR compliance for product analytics?"
